description: Card-to-character wiring with corrective enlightenment energy. Slavering Branchsnapper's trivia quotes Valgavoth's swallowed-suns cosmology directly ('Valgavoth consumed both [suns] as the House grew a tower piercing the clouds') and the low amber sun in the art's background reads as the swallowed-sun motif — load-bearing Valgavoth-specific detail, NOT generic plane-ruler boilerplate. Per the valgavoth.md wiring criterion (direct flavor citation OR narrative-agent OR set-context-with-load-bearing-iconographic-detail), Slavering Branchsnapper qualifies on the third path, joining the existing wired roster (Wary Watchdog + Duskmourn's Domination via flavor citation, Betrayer's Bargain via narrative-agent, Infernal Phantom + Say Its Name via load-bearing iconographic detail). Discovered en route to E4 that valgavoth.md had `appears_on: []` despite 5 cards already carrying `characters: ["valgavoth"]` in frontmatter — a Mr. Nodeley node-creation drift. Edge is 1:1 (card → character) but the pass corrects that drift simultaneously: appears_on now lists all 6 wired cards. The valgavoth body's referenced-not-depicted caveat is updated to articulate the wiring criterion (subset of body roster = frontmatter-wired = direct/narrative-agent/load-bearing-iconographic-detail; remainder = body-documented but un-wired, set-context-only). The four set-context-only cards (Razorkin Hordecaller, Frantic Strength, Moldering Gym // Weight Room, Smoky Lounge // Misty Salon) stay body-documented but un-wired. **Topology: 1:1 mirror with frontmatter-side sync of the receiving node's appears_on roster.** Surprise lore worth saving: the swallowed-suns cosmology is BBL's strongest cosmic-extinction-via-extraction frame in the DSK slice — Valgavoth literally ATE both of the plane's suns to fuel the House's growth, an apex-villain energy-economy plot one register more cosmic than Macro Cosmos's planetary-scale Eternatus summoning. Any future Duskmourn Discrete Lair can lean on swallowed-suns + Dynamax-engineered-into-Champion-Cup as the two clearest franchise renderings of apex-villain-as-energy-economy-architect.
citations: [in-corpus cards/_characters/valgavoth.md set-context citation roster + wiring criterion caveat]
[MTG Wiki: Duskmourn (plane) — swallowed-suns cosmology; MTG Wiki: Valgavoth]
